title: chore(deps): update typescript-eslint monorepo to v1.12.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [@typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint) | devDependencies | minor | [`1.11.0` -> `1.12.0`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/@typescript-eslint%2feslint-plugin/1.11.0/1.12.0) |
| [@typescript-eslint/parser](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint) | devDependencies | minor | [`1.11.0` -> `1.12.0`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/@typescript-eslint%2fparser/1.11.0/1.12.0) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint</summary>

### [`v1.12.0`](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​1120httpsgithubcomtypescript-eslinttypescript-eslintcomparev1110v1120-2019-07-12)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/compare/v1.11.0...v1.12.0)

##### Bug Fixes

-   **eslint-plugin:** handle `const;` ([#​633](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/633)) ([430d628](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/430d628)), closes [#​441](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/441)
-   **typescript-estree:** fix `async` identifier token typed as `Keyword` ([#​681](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/681)) ([6de19d3](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/6de19d3))

##### Features

-   **eslint-plugin:** [ban-types] Support namespaced type ([#​616](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/616)) ([e325b72](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/e325b72))
-   **eslint-plugin:** [explicit-function-return-type] add handling for usage as arguments ([#​680](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/680)) ([e0aeb18](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/e0aeb18))
-   **eslint-plugin:** [no-explicit-any] Add an optional fixer ([#​609](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/609)) ([606fc70](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/606fc70))
-   **eslint-plugin:** Add rule no-reference-import ([#​625](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/625)) ([af70a59](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/af70a59))
-   **eslint-plugin:** add rule strict-boolean-expressions ([#​579](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/579)) ([34e7d1e](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/34e7d1e))
-   **eslint-plugin:** added new rule prefer-readonly ([#​555](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/555)) ([76b89a5](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/76b89a5))

</details>
